title: Get source protection
description: Resolves effective protection for a source, or returns global defaults when source_id is omitted.

source_id.description: Source to inspect. Omit for global defaults.
Echo of the requested source_id. Absent when global defaults are returned.

level.description: Effective protection level (resolved: per-source override wins unconditionally; categories elevate only when no override row exists).

block_permanent_delete.description: Effective block_permanent_delete. Resolved from per-source override when present and non-null; otherwise from global default (A2).

categories.description: Protected categories applicable to this source.

inherits_default.description: True when no per-source override exists and global defaults were returned.
